title: Capraria arabica

It belongs to the genus Capraria, which contains several species of annual or perennial herbs. The exact classification of Capraria arabica is as follows: Capraria arabica is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae, order Lamiales, class Magnoliopsida, and kingdom Plantae. Further research may be necessary to confirm the specific classification of Capraria arabica.
